items.title: New: Investment Score with visual breakdown
items.body: Every listing now carries a 0–100 Investment Score composing Value, Land, Risk, Liquidity, and Macro signals. Open a listing detail to see the per-axis bars and what fed each one.

items.title: County voting expanded to all 3,160 US counties
items.body: Voting tags now cover the full national table (was 22 seed counties). Most rural Ozark counties pick up coverage; the chip on each listing detail shows R/D share + bucket.

items.title: Draw-an-area filter on the map
items.body: Map view now supports drawing a polygon to filter listings to that exact area — useful for narrowing to a specific watershed or county subset without dragging the bounding box.
